summary: The team discussed the weekly project update. Development is on track and testing is currently in progress. Sneha flagged a potential delay in the design phase due to client mockups. Aman will prepare the roadmap presentation and share it tomorrow.

transcript.message: Good morning everyone, let's start the weekly sync.
Development is on track. We are finalizing the core modules and starting the integration test.
Yes, testing is in progress and we should have the first QA report by Friday.
We might face some delays in the design phase. I need feedback on the payment layout.
I will prepare the project roadmap and share it with the team tomorrow.

actionItems.title: Prepare project roadmap and share with team
Finalize design mockups and payment layout feedback
